name: acrawl
description: Autonomous LLM-powered web crawler. 17 browser tools + run_goal for fully autonomous multi-step crawling. Single binary, stealth browsing, 25 LLM providers.
long_description:
acrawl is an MCP server that gives your AI assistant real browser automation capabilities. Describe a goal in plain English and run_goal handles the entire crawl autonomously — or use 17 individual browser tools (navigate, click, fill forms, screenshot, etc.) for fine-grained control.

Key features:
- run_goal: delegate an entire multi-step web task in one tool call
- page_map: structured page representation designed for LLM consumption
- Smart HTTP→browser escalation (fast for static pages, headless Chromium when JS needed)
- CloakBrowser stealth (bypasses bot detection)
- No runtime dependencies — single compiled binary

tools.name: navigate
tools.description: Navigate to a URL, returns structured page content

tools.name: click
tools.description: Click an element by CSS selector

tools.name: execute_js
tools.description: Run JavaScript in the page context

tools.name: page_map
tools.description: Get structured page map (headings, forms, links, interactive elements)

tools.name: read_content
tools.description: Extract text by heading or CSS selector

tools.name: list_resources
tools.description: List all links, images, and forms on the page

tools.name: save_file
tools.description: Download a URL to the output directory

tools.name: scroll
tools.description: Scroll the page up or down

tools.name: switch_tab
tools.description: Switch to a different browser tab

tools.name: wait
tools.description: Wait for an element or timeout

tools.name: run_goal
tools.description: Execute a high-level crawl goal autonomously using an internal LLM agent
